utterances.speaker: Janine
utterances.text: Hey Joey , I got some beer for you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uh , do not you mean " for whom ? "

utterances.speaker: Janine
utterances.text: Sure , listen I was gonna order some pizza , you wanna share one ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Pizza , heh , it is not like I never had that before ... ba dum bum cheshhh .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right , All right , let just get this out in the open okay ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Clearly there is a vibe going on between us .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But , we are roommates and it is a huge mistake for us to continue down this road .
